rulings.Case Title: JAMES NASH VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 6, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. Defendant Performance Industries, Inc.¿s motion for summary judgment is granted. No opposition filed. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:45am in Dept. 503, not 9:30am in Dept. 220. If a court reporter is needed, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES NASH VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 6, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. Defendant Highland Stucco and Lime Products, Inc.¿s motion for summary judgment is denied. Plaintiff¿s deposition testimony and declaration and defendant¿s responses to General Order 129 interrogatories create a triable issue whether plaintiff was exposed to asbestos-containing products or materials (Highland stucco) attributable to defendant. Defendant¿s objections to plaintiff¿s declaration and its own General Order 129 responses are overruled. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:45am in Dept. 503, not 9:30am in Dept. 220. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If a court reporter is needed, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN SANTILLAN VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 6, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 4. Defendant Elmco Sales, Inc.¿s motion for summary judgment is denied. Plaintiff¿s deposition testimony and declaration create a triable issue whether plaintiff was exposed to asbestos-containing products or materials (asbestos pipe) attributable to defendant. Plaintiff¿s objections to Mr. Duddy¿s declaration and Mr. Dahlem¿s declaration are sustained. Defendant¿s objections to plaintiff¿s declaration are overruled. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:45am in Dept. 503, not 9:30am in Dept. 220. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If a court reporter is needed, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT GOTTSCHALL VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 6, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 5. Defendant Crane Co.¿s motion for summary judgment and alternative motion for summary adjudication: hearing required. The court is prepared to continue this hearing to allow Mr. Cooks¿ deposition to conclude and to allow defendant to file a supplemental reply regarding that deposition. Noting that the trial date is October 11, the parties should be prepared to discuss the status of Mr. Cooks¿ deposition and the court will likely continue the trial date in this case to allow for this continued hearing. The hearing will be at 9:45am in Dept. 503, not 9:30am in Dept. 220. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If a court reporter is needed, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES C. DAVIDSON et al VS. DOWMAN PRODUCTS, INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Joinder To Defendant Ford Motor Company, Inc.S Motion To Transfer Venue And Stay Proceedings Pending Transfer
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 6, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 11. Defendant Kelly-Moore Paint Company, Inc.¿s joinder to defendant Ford Motor Company¿s motion to transfer venue and stay proceedings pending transfer is denied without prejudice. The underlying motion was taken off calendar and defendant¿s joinder failed to provide proper notice pursuant to C.C.P. § 1005(b). Defendant may re-file to comply with the notice requirements of C.C.P. § 1005(b) and C.C.P. § 1010.6 if using electronic service. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:45am in Dept. 503, not 9:30am in Dept. 220. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If a court reporter is needed, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. = (503/TLJ)
